prompt_text: productivity tools with native Slack integration
response:
# Top Productivity Tools with Native Slack Integration

## Project Management
- **Asana** - Tasks, timelines, portfolios with Slack notifications
- **Monday.com** - Work OS with deep Slack workflow automation
- **Jira** - Issue tracking with real-time Slack alerts
- **Trello** - Card-based boards with Slack automation
- **Notion** - Notes, databases, wikis with Slack reminders

## Communication & Collaboration
- **Loom** - Video messaging with Slack sharing
- **Google Workspace** - Docs, Sheets, Meet with Slack integration
- **Microsoft Teams** - (limited but growing Slack integration)

## Time & Task Management
- **Clockify** - Time tracking with Slack logging
- **Toggl** - Time tracking with Slack commands
- **TickTick** - To-do lists with Slack sync
- **Todoist** - Task management with Slack notifications

## Analytics & Reporting
- **Databox** - Dashboard monitoring with Slack alerts
- **Mixpanel** - Analytics with Slack integration
- **Google Analytics** - Via native Slack integration

## Automation & Workflow
- **Zapier** - Connects 1000+ apps to Slack
- **Make** - No-code automation platform
- **IFTTT** - Simple automation recipes

## Note-Taking & Knowledge
- **Evernote** - With Slack clipping
- **OneNote** - Microsoft integration available

---

**Pro tip:** Check each tool's Slack App Directory listing for specific features, commands, and permissions before integrating.
